Hotel Pompei Italy Stay is in the perfect position to access the pompeii archeological site. It is also 100m from the train line making the commute from rome, naples or sorrento / amalfi coast super easy. Rooms were clean and good value for the money we paid.
Right by the train station and walking distance to the ruins. It's very convenient.

I chose to stay at hotel (camping) Pompei Italy Stay at the recommendation of a friend, who has stayed there for years when working at pompeii. Except for a few nights when i had to tolerate a loud neighbor, the room and grounds were quiet. The facilities were clean and in good repair, with excellent housekeeping and a staffed, friendly, and helpful front desk. I liked that the room had a mini-fridge, so i could keep some drinks, yogurt, fruit, and left-overs. The room also has a mini-safe to stash one’s travel docs and electronics. People stay in the area for convenient access to the cirvumvesuviana and the main entrance of pompeii. Unfortunately, most nearby restaurants close at 6:00 pm, so you need to stock your mini-fridge, walk into town, or up and around the corner to the few nearby restaurants for dinner. My reservation came with breakfast every morning, which was very basic, continental: yogurt, espresso or cappuccino, cakes, croissants, ham or salami, and bread. The “juice” was really just a sweetened water drink. That said, the staff were very nice. For a more substantial breakfast, the bar/restaurant sgambati (owned by the same people?) serves omelettes, in addition to a regular menu of appetizers, salads, panini, pasta, and pizzas. Overall, i was very satisfied staying at hotel/camping Pompei Italy Stay and look forward to returning.

Hotel is located very close th Pompeii Scavi train station, very convenient for visitor to the pompeii archeological site. Finding the hotel is very confusing. You must go into a campground and then you see the small hotel. The hotel needs to improve their signs so that hotel guest know that the hotel is there. The room was small but comfortable. We checked in late. Our room was not ready, but housekeeping got to it reasonably quickly. Breakfast was adequate. Quality of offerings mediocre for the most part. Good coffee. One of the wait staff seemed surly. Appeared to be some kind of staff conflict.
We check in after midnight and the front desk gentleman was very helpful.
Great hotel for visiting Pompeii. Everything clean, nice,.
This hotel was spotless, quiet, and staff was friendly.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: Neues, genial gelegenes garni-hotel an den ruinen.
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: Whoever has the excavations of Pompeii on the plan and arrives by train at the Pompeii Scavi station is not far from the Garni Hotel Villa Pompei Italy Stay on the edge of a pretty campsite, lined with orange trees. Super friendly staff!!!!
Close to everything and the train station on property.

Positive: The hotel is super centrally located for trips with or without a rental car. You can reach all important places within a short time on foot: the entrance to Pompeii within 2 minutes, a supermarket within 10 minutes, a train station is 1 minute away. There are many restaurants within walking distance. The room is cleaned very thoroughly every day. You get new towels and new toiletries every day. The rooms are located with the terrace directly at the parking lot of the campsite, which is planted with many orange trees, which I would rather consider positive. If you have a rental car, you can park directly "at the door." The rooms are quietly located, and both the parking lot and the campsite are always quiet. The room is equipped with an exterior blind, which allows you to shield it well from the sun/heat. The refrigerator in the room is for private use. The air conditioning also worked perfectly for us. The reception is staffed 24 hours and the staff there is very friendly. Negative: The breakfast is very simple. It has only the bare essentials and is the same every day. The service in the restaurant could be improved. The cappuccino, however, is very good:) All in all, we were very satisfied and can recommend the hotel with a clear conscience.

Unfortunately, we only had cold water for showers for two days. This was fixed on the evening of the second day. The house is very noisy; we had neighbors who thought they had the house to themselves. The hotel staff is very nice. The 'ladies' in the breakfast room at the restaurant across the street are indifferent to the point of rudeness and not very service-oriented. Overall, recommended for one to two nights when visiting Pompeii and Vesuvius, especially considering the price. It is about 160 meters to the entrance of Pompeii. The train station is 100 meters away.

Very convenient location for both the Pompeii Scavi railway station and the the ruins as well as the vesuvius bus. Limited options for evening dining but there are a number of dining places about ten minutes walk down the hill. There is limited outside areas to sit. The internet in the rooms is poor but adequate if you go into the corridor near the router.
Great for those like us who wanted to visit the excavations of Pompeii. Italy Stay is close to both the entrance and the exit.

Visited during late august 2024. Positives: - inexpensive
- exceptionally convenient for a visit to pompeii. You are as close as you can be without actually being inside the ruins
- the fellow at the front desk was kind and helpful and let us store our luggage while we visited pompeii
- the hotel is clean and the tvs and bathroom fixtures work
- breakfast is available and it's fair negatives:
- the a/c works, but it does not go low enough. You can only lower your room to a certain degree and probably out of a desire to reduce energy usage, it does not go as low as you want it to go when you are there in the blazing summer.
- mosquitoes. We were killing them left and right. I'm a magnet for them so this is a bigger problem for me than most, but boy was it annoying to keep hunting them.

Pros: very convenient location, staff were helpful and nice, room was clean, aircond worked fine.
Cons: noisy - its a busy area and the walls are thin. Weird lumpy beds and pillows. Breakfast was v disappointing: only a few sweet pastries, cornflakes, really woeful coffee and plastic cheese. Eating in the nearby restaurants was very expensive, although the food was nice there. Overall i felt it was ok for the cost of the hotel.

Pros: well located to visit the archaeological site of Pompeii. Parking in front of the room. Clean. Courteous staff. Reasonable price (102 CAD).
Cons: poor breakfast with few options (greasy commercial pastries, barely a few slices of ham, packaged commercial cheese, etc.). Wi-Fi does not work in the room. Towels are thin like table napkins. Poorly identified (Camping Pompei Italy Stay and not Hotel Pompei Italy Stay: confusing). This hotel is good for one night if you are visiting the Pompeii site. Nothing more.

It is very well located, close to the Vesuvio Circumferrata Railway station and right in front of the Pompeii ruins. While the Trenitalia Pompeii station area has more restaurants and souvenir shops, this place is a bit farther from the main entrance of the Pompeii ruins. (If your main purpose is sightseeing the ruins, a hotel on the west side of Pompeii ruins is preferable.) The facilities feel a bit aged in some places, but overall, it was clean, possibly renovated. The shower temperature and water pressure were within acceptable ranges, and I think it offers good value for the price. However, perhaps because it was the off-season, breakfast only consisted of croissants, ham, cheese, and yogurt, which was a little disappointing. It would have been even better if there were a simple salad, for example. This accommodation is recommended for those whose main purpose of travel is sightseeing Pompeii and who don't have many other specific requirements.

Nice clean hotel on the way on highway 75. Room large enough for 3 people.

The staff was extremely helpful especially the late night front desk lady. The only thing i didn't like was that when i checked out i did not receive a receipt. They said they would have to email it and i have not received it.
The property was fine. Needed a new shower curtain.

We stayed a very short time overnight. It was pretty much what we were looking for. Closet to where we wanted, king size bed, good a/c, clean, good area. Nice hotel just noisy had a ver uncomfortable stay the hall way carpet was dirty had a funny meldow smell to it and the guest next to us stsyed slamming there door all day and talking loud i came for rest and went bsck home tired because i got no sleep they need to make the window class thick all night i heard the interstate traffic judt ovetall awful.

We have always stayed at the Ocala United States Stay inn and Ocala United States Stay because it was always well managed and convenient for us on our trip to florida. I feel that things have changed and it doesn't have the same feel as it did in the past. We were given a room that didn't have a vanity in it and it was really hard to find a place for our toiletries, actually there was none and we are not handicapped. The hotel was not totally full and i feel that we went through a third party we were given an any old room!
Very nice and helpful staff. Excellent customer service. This is my second stay and i could not been more happy. Near to every thing. Clean and modern.
The manager was the rudest nastiest womam i’ve ever encountered in my life! Very unprofessional and very very very rude.

Terrible! Room was dirty, had to wait 20 minutes to get toilet paper, blood stain on the floor, pillows tiny and only one per person. Pool was dirty and the smoking area just outside so it smelled of smoke. Oh, and housekeeping knocked on the door at 8:30am! Just terrible!
For what it cost, we thought it was very nice, the breakfast was more than we expected.
We got a suit and there was dog hair on our floor and in our bed. Obviously not cleaned.

Paint was falling from the ceiling above the pool. Ac was not working in pool room. Bathrooms were out of order and disgusting. Floors and bathroom were dirty. We found old food on the floor of our room. Mold in areas of the hotel. Trash cans around the hotel stayed full for two days.

This hotel is immediately off an exit for highway i-75, so was very noisy during the day and night. Loud vehicles, sirens, etc. As such, there was also a lot of traffic and to go back and forth to restaurants and shopping involved many u-turns. Some of the staff was friendly and helpful but others sort of ignored us when we would stop by the front desk for something. At check-out we were told they could not give us a receipt (?) they could not give us a do not disturb sign and the wi-fi didn't work in the evenings. The bathroom in our room was in need of some serious repair work. The breakfast buffet was good and the attendant there was nice. I would not stay at this hotel again.

It was convenient to everything. However the room had a smell that wasnt pleasant, the tv kept going in and out, the ac was not cooling properly and the drain for the tub was broken and laying upside down in the drain.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Location was good.
Very convenient location if you are planning to use train going to other cities and walkable distance to tourists spots. Only negative for me no amenities such as coffee maker in the room.

Situation to rome termini was excellent as we were travelling to the airport by train. Plenty of authentic restaurants within a small radius of the hotel. One of the Rome Italy Stay buffet breakfasts i have had. So much choice.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Nice location.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Stayed from 3 nights in this hotel with my wife and baby, location is great and room was ready with baby crib when we arrived, breakfast is ok, no bottled water in the room like most hotels do.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Fantastic location near termini.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Great location for transport links in and out of rome and the metro. All main sight seeing attractions within easy walking distance and a choice of good restaurants and cafés nearby. Nice clean and comfortable rooms with helpful and friendly staff.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Tolles hotel beim bahnhof.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Booked a triple room - got a junior suite on the 7th floor with a great view! Bathroom was fantastic with a rain shower and an extra bathtub, beds very comfortable, perfect for relaxing after being on your feet all day. Breakfast diverse for Italian standards - tip: order an espresso from the waiter. Public transport right around the corner at the station - so everything easily accessible and also easy to find your way back to the hotel. Wi-Fi in the hotel very convenient. Found 2 TV channels in German. Luggage storage before check-in and after check-out worked perfectly. We will gladly come back!
Good hotel at city centre and for tours by rail - will recommend any time!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Prima hotel, goede ligging.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Great hotel, within walking distance of Termini station. The hop-on hop-off bus stops nearby. Also nearby a good restaurant (Babbo's) where you can have an early meal and sit outside. The hotel has a modern appearance and therefore lacks some charm. Breakfast is extensive, but somewhat bland in taste. We stayed for three nights in a room for three people. Then it is quite annoying if you have a bathroom that floods every time you shower. It is a construction defect, complaining at the reception did not solve the problem (despite the promise to send someone). So: make sure you get a room with a bathtub!
Excelente hotel, a unos pasos de termini, buena ubicación.

Rome Italy Stay Rome Italy Stay Rome Italy Stay Rome Italy Stay santini located just across the train station. Great location and many good local restaurants and shops in the area. The city sightseeing bus across the street and also the airport bus. Special thanks to the front desk staff, especially rina! She went the extra mile for us:).

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Nice hotel close to termini.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: This hotel is of a good standard. It's clean and stylish. The staff are helpful. It's very close to roma termini and so is convenient. The baths in the rooms are huge. The rooms even have mood lighting.
Short walk to rome termini. Staff was very accommodating. Facilities were clean.
We loved our stay! Very clean, excellent location, and the staff was very helpful and friendly. Only positive things to say about this hotel. Thank you!
Nice location and very good service. It is easy to book and communicate with hotel staff.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: A really nice hotel - no complaints.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: The hotel is in a nice location close to the railway station with all of the shops in the station complex being very convenient. It is only a 5 minute walk into the edge of the main (older) part of the city so very well placed. We flew into fiumicino and decided to use the bus to get into the city as it was the cheapest option and woohoo, the bus terminates directly opposite the the Rome Italy Stay Rome Italy Stay so is absolutely perfect - don't waste a penny more on shuttle buses or private taxis if you stay at the Rome Italy Stay Rome Italy Stay.!! The room is modern, clean with air conditioning and a nice bathroom - all we wanted. We only ate breakfast there but at three euros for a buffet breakfast it was unbeatable with a big choice of different food from bacon, sausage and scrambled egg to fruit, cooked meats and cheese, pancakes and different sweet cake options - awesome. The staff are very friendly and helpful - i really would not think of using another hotel if we ever go back to rome again.

Basically the hotel is good in being located very close to rome termini, having a good breakfast and others. But we felt that the room (we used, at least) needs reconsideration on designs of the room facility.
Great location near the main train snd subway stations. Friendly and responsive hotel and restaurant staff.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Good hotel close to central station.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Big room, lots of space, large bathroom and clean. Breakfast was not good at all. Bread and croissants not fresh and eggs watered down. Staff friendly and helpful. Free wifi and computer in lobby with free usage is good for ticket booking. Nowhere close by to eat that's decent.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Proche gare centrale.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Very convenient as it is located at the airport shuttle arrival or at the mainline train arrival for travelers who have chosen this mode of transport. Spacious room with contemporary decor. Kettle available for coffee/tea. Wifi and breakfast: okay.
Very nnice hotel. However, it is not very close to city centre. Good prices and very comfortable rooms.
Very well located. Walking distance to most attractions.
清潔でしたし、浴槽も広くてよかった.
The hotel is very well located and it is noticeable that its facilities have been renovated. Also, its staff was always very kind and attentive in assisting us.
The rooms are very clean and comfortable, and its closeness with the train station it’s extremely convenient.

I had never been to rome and wasn't sure about the locaition of this hotel, but it was perfect. Across the street was the trail station and everything was in walking distance. The staff was extremly helpful. I would definatley stay there again.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 駅近で便利.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: テルミナ駅から徒歩5分ほどの便利な立地にあります。空港からもバスや特急で直行できて、アクセスが良かったです。 ビジネスホテルのような感じで、ローマらしいクラッシック感はないですが、とても清潔感がありました。掃除もきちんとされていて室内は快適でした。 近くにはカフェやレストランもあり、テルミナ駅にはスーパーもありますので、買物にも便利でおすすめです。.

This property is conveniently close to the termini train station. Walkable distances to most of rome's major sites within the aurelian wall. Staff will call taxis if requested, and taxis show up within 2-3 minutes. The breakfast has a great selection of food. All staff are friendly and helpful. We had a junior suite (king size bed) on the 7th floor with a balcony. We approximated this balcony to be 22-feet by 5-feet: huge!!! We enjoyed magnificent views of rome everyday from the balcony, including st. Peter's basilica and santa maria maggiore.
Staff were very friendly.

We enjoyed our stay in rome at the Rome Italy Stay Rome Italy Stay Rome Italy Stay Rome Italy Stay. The staff were nice and helpful. The breakfast was really nice. Just down the street from termini train station so very convenient for public transport and hopping on the train to get to our next destination.

We stayed one night at the end of our two week italy trip so we would be near roma termini station for an early morning trip to the airport. Easy check-in and check-out. Less that 5 minute walk to termini. Clean room. Did not try the restaurant or other amenities.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Prima hotel!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Great hotel. Pleasant modern rooms. Friendly and helpful staff. Extensive and good breakfast buffet.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Comfortable room next to termini station.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Comfortable hotel, great location to explore the city.
It was really close to Termini Station, and the airport shuttle was right in front of the hotel, which was really convenient. The hotel's location is excellent.

Great hotel so close to the train station. Everything has been redone so a very modern feel to the rooms and inside property. Short walk to the train station. Good selection of restaurants in the area. Nice little bar in main lobby that has a happy hour with nice munchies. Staff was very friendly and helpful.
We stayed only one night in rome at this hotel. It was the greatest value for money. Expansive room, great airconditioning. Helpful staff. I wish we stayed longer!

Right next to the train station, it is ideally located so that you can walk to all of the major sites in 20-30 minutes, vatican is 60 minute walk. Clean with friendly and helpful staff. It made our stay in rome very enjoyable,.
The staff were very friendly, the complimentary breakfast was excellent, i would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting rome!
I was given a handicapped room, and the showerhead had issues water sprayed all over the bathroom and i had to mop it up with towels.
Would highly recommend to friends.
Close to train station room' was comfortable breakfast was awesome.

Outstanding property that catered to the english-speaking community. While this may not sound like much, after a long travel day in a foreign country, it's a very welcome feeling to have a small place to return to where you can relax both physically and mentally. The amenities themselves were outstanding and due to the proximity of the train station, everything from the colosseum to the airport was easily accessible. Thankfully, it's rome, so most everything is walkable--as long as the weather cooperates.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: The transportation is really convenient. The rooms are also very clean and nice. Since it is a 4-star hotel, the price is a bit burdensome, but it is still reasonable. If you plan to go around a lot, it is suitable for staying around Termini.
Location, close to the train station.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: We were a party of 5. The hotel was helpful.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: We were able to get 2 communicaying rooms. Great for traveling with children.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: Hotel moderno vicino alla stazione.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: Excellent location, so recommended for those arriving by train. The maintenance of the rooms needs a lot of improvement.

Excellent location close to termini station - easy to find when we got off our train. Also conveniently the bus to the airport stops right across the street from the hotel. The hotel is about a half hour walk from the colosseum. The room was beautiful - simple but very clean. Would stay there again.
Well located, renovatd, clean, comfortable and excellent breakfast.

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: I liked the service.

It was a super beautiful and pleasant night! The accommodation is so homely and you feel totally welcome! The room was in a clean and well-kept condition. A big compliment to the hotel owner, you rarely meet such a nice person, very very loving! Always gladly again!

Very kind owner who takes a personal interest in her guests. Clean. Comfortable beds. Free mineral water.
On the negative side, there are no fridges in rooms and tv reception was poor. Also there used to be a very good restaurant downstairs which is now under different management and is much less appealing.
Very clean, comfortable beds, friendly and helpful proprietor.

The shower was full of mold inside. So when I took a towel, quite a few moths came towards me. The bed creaked with the slightest movement so that we couldn't sleep. But the lady is really very nice. It just doesn't make up for the rest.
Newly renovated room, great bed (strandkorb model). Bathroom was very small, only separated by a very wobbly folding door, and the shower cabin on the slanted wall was also very small.

I stayed here for 2 nights from Friday, November 30 to Sunday, December 2 and I really enjoyed it. It is a very cozy small hotel with very friendly staff who make you feel completely at home. Breakfast was perfect, bed was good, and everything was clean.
I liked the friendly staff and quiet locatin. Rooms are a little chilly this time of year though.

Conveniently located beautiful Bochum Germany stay, very quiet despite the restaurant downstairs. Clean, very well-maintained room, very friendly and accommodating owner. We lacked nothing. Highly recommended!
Gute anbindung an u-bahn, freundliches personal.

Friendly lady at reception, dogs were also very welcome. The lady herself also has a dog. Everything is neat, and anyone who wishes can have a nice breakfast, unfortunately we didn’t have time for that. We will definitely come back.
Super nice staff, very good food, sufficient parking, very good public transport connections.

We loved our stay at the hotel Bochum Germany Stay Bochum Germany Stay in bochum. Highly recommended.
Welcoming and just perfect. Thank you for a great and amazing stay.
The reception was unfortunate because that day was a day of rest.
A bit dated, but otherwise okay. Staff very friendly.
The hotel is hard to find, as the exterior has changed in the meantime.
In need of updating and refurbishing.
The staff were incredibly friendly, my room was better than i expected. It was exactly what i needed and i will stay there again!
Everything was great, only I'm not a lightweight. The mattress was too thin, otherwise everything was fine.
Cozy accommodation at a fair price.
👍 supernett.

The most striking thing was the friendliness, openness, and attentiveness of the staff! Rarely experienced anything like it! Many thanks for everything! Upon request, even gluten-free breakfast is served! The Wi-Fi is very unstable. Somewhat unpleasant were the smells; from the smell of grease to stale cigarette smoke. This was only bearable with the window open day and night and air freshener.
The room was very cold, and the lighting only worked halfway.

The accommodation was clean, good, and very friendly staff. Breakfast was available from 7:00 a. M. To 11:00 a. M. It was plentiful, good coffee, fresh rolls, etc. The connection to the city is great, only 3 stops by subway.
Very good location - nice reception - we will gladly come again.
At breakfast, it was already quite disgusting that the dog pulled the sausage off the tray. Overall, the hotel seems gloomy and dusty. For one night, though, you can put up with it there.
Very nice lady at the reception.
The hotel owner is very caring and warm-hearted.
Very aged. Carpet everywhere. Unpleasant smell from the restaurant on the ground floor. Very loving owner.
Very friendly and family-like atmosphere. Just a bit hard to find with the GPS. But small and cozy. Was very nice.
The staff was very friendly and responded to all requests as quickly as possible.

Very friendly and accommodating landlady. I received breakfast half an hour earlier on request. She even brought me something extra from the bakery for that. And the price was more than fair. I can warmly recommend this Bochum Germany Stay. Greetings.

A nice hotel, not new, somewhat rustic, but pleasant. The staff is very friendly and tries to fulfill every wish. If I ever have to stay in Bochum again, then I know where I will go. I felt very comfortable and.
Quite ok for few nights, ~25 min walking to centre.
I was there for only one night. Everything went well and I slept well.
The staff is very friendly and makes an effort to fulfill every guest's wish. Very family-friendly. I can only say good things.
Owner very nice, breakfast great, room simply furnished but clean, I can recommend it for a stopover in Bochum. Next to it a wonderful wine bar.
Great location. Short walking distance to the train.

Friendly staff, good kitchen, everything clean and everything available.
Would gladly come again.
Uschi and Klaus from Wolfsburg.
Very good and affordable accommodation. I am happy to come back.

The rooms are already a bit 'worn out.' Television without private channels (RTL, Sat 1, etc.) because no CI module is available. Beds and bed linen are clean. The bed linen itself is functional but not new. Some buttons are missing or parts are torn. Bathroom is clean and tidy. However, the towels are also a bit long in the tooth (frayed at the edges). On the positive side, I noticed that we had a fly screen in front of the window. However, not in the bathroom or the other room. Breakfast is very simple: one type of sausage and one type of cheese from the package. Various sweet spreads in small disposable portions. Egg dishes on request. The rolls seemed fresh and not pre-baked. Various types of muesli available. I missed fresh fruit and vegetables as well as quark or plain yogurt. A nicer presentation would certainly have been possible. But it fills you up. The staff is really very friendly, the rooms were well cleaned. For me, the location at the roundabout took some getting used to (quite loud), the combination with a restaurant (you can smell food in the room when cooking is happening downstairs; check-in is also a bit awkward) and the really thin-walled rooms (greetings to the colleagues with their 'nightcap' at three o'clock in the morning).

An excellent experience. Room simple but very clean. The host is very friendly, there are water and fruit on the house, available 24/7. Excellent german style breakfast that will be prepared on demand.
The location is especially convenient, only 3-4 min walking from the underground station (3 stops from train station), in very quiet area.
Recommend without reservation.

a036cbe1d9fbf9cba088075d1b4d966ee871df55.text: It’s well located. It’s opposite to the riverside mall. We enjoy shopping.
My stay was good! Just a bit of hustle and bustle at the hotel during breakfast! Thanks.
Location is very convenient; walking distance from the mall.

Our room was nothing like the pictures featured on the internet. The floors were all tile and the overall look and feel was institutional grey, white and black. It was not at all inviting, and i would never recommend it to anyone. Also, despite advertising unlimited internet, even in the rooms, the only place that we could connect is in the lobby. The only positive experience was the staff who were very nice.
Very nice! Safe, clean, affordable and great breakfast.
Location close to the mall, dealerships for servicing vehicles. Heart of the city.
Busy budget hotel. Staff was very friendly and worked to please. Room carpet could use a good wash. Restaurant furniture a bit worn. Breakfast was simple, but good and adequate.

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: Great.
The staff were super friendly and helpful.
Sicky awesome great time good food good booze foos ball!

The entire hotel property provides lots of large spaces for hanging out or entertaining large groups of people. The spaces are nicely designed for any event or holiday.
One of the best hotels i've stayed at. Great deal from expedia! Thanks.
Excellent place to stay. Would definitely recommend it to all of my friends.
The service and restaurants were top notch. The shuttle was very convenient and the driver was super-friendly and helpful.
Great!
Beautiful hotel. A little pricey dinner in the maritage.
Very convenient location. Easy drive into boulder or denver.
Awesome staff.

The property offers a relaxing atmosphere. There is an outdoor hot tub which was pleasant in the colder temps. The staff are courteous and kind. This is a nice hotel for a get away from the city bustle.

Great spot, helpful staff. But, no dining for breakfast or lunch. Safe & phone in room didn’t work, pool wasn’t tended to very well. Hoping they can staff up as i always stay here when first visiting denver area.
Top nitch all the way, thank you! First class establishment.
Outdoor pool and hot tub were amazing in the cold and snow.
Everything was absolutely fabulous. Just wish the pool was indoors.

Amazing staff at check in and check out, in the tap room and also the meritage. Above courteous compared to other hotels and it is really appreciated. All staff should be commended for their thoroughness and thoughtfulness. Rooms were very clean, comfy and had needed amenities. I loved the lobby area with fireplace, cozy and quiet rooms and overall a restful stay. The most takeaway is the the overall hotel amenities, amazing staff and convenience, you can eat a nice breakfast that won't break the bank, a nice dinner and drink at a very fun restaurant/bar and both in the hotel. Next time i hope to stay longer.

They advertise 2 pools and the whole week we were there only one pool was open to the public as appearantly they put too much chemicals in the pool. We normally wouldn't mind but the other pool is quite small and was absolutely packed with young kids. Then we tried to book a massage and they told us they were booked out the 4 days we were there! When you pay the amount of money we payed to stay you would think that they could have all the facilities working. The saving grace was the staff, rachel up at the front desk was very friendly and accommodating. Elijah in the tap room bar is a great server and a lot of fun, they should give that guy a raise! The staff makes the stay worth it.
Extremely nice as always and professional.
Enjoyed the room. Nice pools and hot tub. Sunday breakfast in restaurant was excellent.
I loved the spa on property. The many pools were nice for people to spread out. Loved the apples in the lobby.
Scenery and amenities. Restaurant needs to be open later.
The pools are fantastic.

This was a great place to stay. The staff and hotel overall exceeded our expectations. The room was spacious, clean and had a great view. It was worth the cost and it didn't take long for us to get to the rocky mountains for days of hiking and taking in the beauty of this area.
Front desk was friendly and helpful. Room was clean and comfortable. Robes are a nice touch. The property is well maintained. We had an excellent experience.
Very lovely place. Very accommodating and friendly.
Beautiful pool area. Hot tub and pool could use more cleaning. Carpet in hotel was disgusting. Service was very slow at pool, coffee shop, etc. Overall nice hotel but don’t think we’d go back.
Great service and great location. Will be back again soon.
Great pool area, friendly staff, close to boulder and denver.
Would never stay here again absolutely zero good things to say about this place.
A good place to stay and a cut above normal chain hotels.
The staff was super friendly and accommodating! We had a stressful travel day and they made sure to take great care of us and our dogs!
Front desk very efficient and kind. The pool and small gym were clean and comfortable. Nice stay overall and only 10 min drive to boulder. Will come back again.
Nice and clean easy parking and there is so much things to do in the area.
The pools are heated and the entire staff keeps the property beautiful. All with smiles on their faces. Everyone was kind and respectful and happy to see us! We will definitely be going back!!
Staff was very friendly, elevators were broken often, pictures were misleading. No fitted sheet so had pleasure of waking up touching mattress. Limited cleaning. Bathrooms were very dated.

Property appearance was pretty. Pool was very nice. Outdoor movie was nice on friday but need every night. Elevators were terrible (always long waits). Pool bar closed at 7pm which is too early. Should stay open until at least 9pm (especially on weekends); having to go to tap room to get a drink and bring it to the pool was very inconvenient. You're missing revenue on this decision.
Awesome service, food and close to shopping. Staff went out of their way to make us feel wecome.
We only stayed one night for the cu game, but it was a nice property. Would like to stay here again & spend the day at the pool.
Property showing its age… last remodel done poorly…staff wonderful and property clean.
I think the staff at the hotel were very interested in their guests. They were very kind!

Which in that suite my wife was happy with a tub, but the shower did not work. That hotel staff needs some training in customer/guest care. There is a nice thing about this hotel, it's close to the beach.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: We weren’t allowed to check in early, but that’s just what happens. Hotel is very nice. Area is safe and walkable to the aquarium and cannery row.
Very clean and great location.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Convenient location.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Good. Clean convenient. Good breakfast. Would recommend and stay there ourselves again.
Room a bit old and dated. No insulation under door to room. Good location.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Near to cannery row.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: This place was very clean and comfortable, breakfast was decent and they had also a wine and cheese happy hour. The service at the desk was excellent. Just 1 street up from cannery row and all the shops, restaurants and the monterey aquarium.
There were 2 staircase we had to climb to get to the room. Being a senior make it difficult plus carrying our suitcase.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Nettes hotel in zentraler lage.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Hotel with sufficient parking spaces in the underground garage. Good location for the harbor and for the beach walk.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Great location, nice hotel.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: We stayed here two nights while exploring monterey and carmel. Our room was on the ground floor near the check-in desk so we really didn't have the opportunity to see much of the rest of the hotel. The location is excellent, within walking distance of everything in monterey. The parking is in a garage underneath the hotel. The breakfast was nice - more than just all those bread products that most hotels offer.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Very nice!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: It was in walking distance to shops and the aquarium. The continental breakfast was great, and everyone who worked there was very nice.
Great location. Great price.
We appreciated the friendly and helpfulness of all property staff.

The guy who looks like a manager helped me a lot for parking. Because i drove 11 foot height sprinter to there and there was no place for me to park it. And this guy came out of hotel and made a space for sprinter very quickly. Thanks again, 👍.

It is a great spot to walk to shops and dining.
The only downside is that you can hear people walking in the rooms above. We were woken up very eay each day because it wasso noisy above us. We complained to the front desk but nothing changed.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Rude staff.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: We got there early and jose let us check in and said come back in 2 hours to get key to rm 107 on first floor. We came back and he said he did not say that and only room left was on third floor. We are 65 yr old and had to go down and then up two flights of stairs with our luggage, i almost fell. Location was good but won't go back because of what i just wrote.
Like the location. Walkable distance to attractions.
Great location, restaurant all over, only take 10 minutes to walk to the aquarium.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Nice hotel close to monterey bay aquarium.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Good clean hotel in monterey. Walking distance to monterey bay aquarium, cannery row and fisherman's wharf. Overall, great stay for families with kids.
Everything and everyone was great 👍.
Staff, especially the front desk was very helpful. Location is a short walk to monterey bay aquarium. The morning breakfast was filling!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Great location near cannery row.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Great value home in great location a 5 minute walk to cannery row. Stayed there while an vacation with family and no complaints.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Nice but not fancy.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Nice but not fancy hotel. You are getting a great location.
Friendly and courteous staff. Check in and out was easy.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Great hotel.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Nice hotel with close proximity to monetary bay aquarium. The breakfast spread was decent. We have requested for early check in and jose ( hotel receptionist) gladly acceded to our request. He even went the extra mile to help my elderly mom to shift the luggages to the room while we were away at monetary bay aquarium. Thumbs up for his excellent service!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Close to the beach.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Breakfast was great and we enjoyed the wine tasting in the evening.
Safe streets, no homeless, or concerns like in san francisco.
Great location, loved the breakfast, very nice and friendly staff/people at the front desk - especially ben! We will be back!

This property is in a wonderful location. It was easy to walk to the aquarium and many restaurants. The staff was very helpful. The complementary breakfast had a wide variety of foods. The beds were extremely comfortable with an excellent selection of pillows. I will definitely stay here again.
Great location, free parking, excellent breakfast.
Friendly staff. Good location.
All was good, however no elevator to our floor, and couldn't take the luggage cart with us because the stairs.
Great hotel within walking distance to restaurants, shops & the monterey bay aquarium.
Property has a great location that is walking distance to all top attractions. Parking and breakfast are included. Have a great staff.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Nice hotel close to c row.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Cool to walk from room to cr lots of food nearby monterey is nature at its best carmel is nature at its finest this reviewing process is lame.
Very cordial staff.
So close to everything, especially the aquarium! The breakfast was delicious and the staff was helpful and kind. We can’t wait to return to monterey and stay here again.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Great hotel in heart of cannery row.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Hotel has an excellent location at the southeast end of cannery row. A 15min walk to the monterey bay aquarium, tons of great dinning nearby. Would stay here again.

The hotel was well placed in monterey. It was clean and the staff was professional.
But the room gave on the foam street and this road is noising all the day even the night).

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: Great location.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: Everything you need was in walking distance. For people that like to take a small hike there is a great walking trail by the beach.
Good for cannery row sightseeing. Room is clean. Breakfast is enough for us.

Great location! Walking distance to cannery row, monterey aquarium, and fisherman wharf. Staff is friendly. Free breakfast and free parking! Coffee and tea station is available all day. The rooms are very simple and basic. However, if you just need a place to lodge overnight and have a busy agenda then this place is perfect!
Young lady that checked us in was wonderful.
Very close to the aquarium, beach and shops. Great for the family.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: Convenient to shopping and dining options. Good business hotel.
Staff.

Great location, friendly staff, quiet, convenient, and nice lobby. I was disappointed that there was no food service on sunday night. We were in town for a meet and did not get out until 9:45. It would have been nice to be able to order room service even if only a limited menu.
Perfect location for enjoying stockyards! Staff was great!!!
The bathroom wasn't as clean as i like but it was fine. Food at the hotel was expensive. They only had an outdoor pool which isnt open during the winter months.
Reall clean, nice, and safe hotel. Ample parking. Always a great experience with a nice staff.
Dinner at the restaurant was amazing, staff was friendly.
Great stay. Great check in staff. I would stay there again.
I would come to this hotel repeatedly whenever i was in town.
Super convenient and stylish hotel. Absolutely loved the staff. So welcoming and very nice. Great amenities and a comfortable room with a great bed and linens.

I've stayed at hotel Frisco United States Stay locations around the world (my favorite one is in hong kong) and am always pleasantly surprised. Appreciate the unique modern decor, beautiful bathrooms and toiletries. Staff was very friendly at this location. Breakfast was not included, but enjoyed a beautifully presented breakfast at the restaurant. Will continue to book hotels within this chain. Thank you!
Nice new hotel good price good location clean rooms nice beds.
Very nice and clean, great facilities and breakfast!
Great clean hotel. Renovated room. Wonderful shower.
Loved everything except for the lack of a room fridge.
Clean property, fast check-in and a great location in frisco.
We stayed here for my son's wedding in frisco. The hotel was beautiful and the staff was very friendly and accommodating.
Great!
Lovely area and close to everything we wanted to do in frisco. Love lounge area for hanging out, nice room, friendly staff.

Room 314, bathroom flooding whenever the shower was used. At least 1/4 inch water covering the floor. Unsafe to try and use toilet.
Would not move us to another room.
It was perfect and so clean, staff were nice and helpful.
Friendly staff. That’s one of the most important things. I witnessed your staff handling conflict, with another guest, fantastically.
Clean.

Nice sized rooms and attentive staff however, e were bummed that the room did not have a mini fridge or microwave. Breakfast was delicious at the parlor and it is definitely a must have if you’re staying longer than 1 night!
The place is very clean and well-maintained. Also dog friendly which is a huge plus!
Great.
Great location. Friendly and helpful staff. Will visit again.
Amazing stay with two kids under 5.
I love the area around the hotel. The staff was very friendly.

Was very quiet but very close to the star with shopping and restaurants. Only downsize the night we stayed july 4th bar was closed. And next day no breakfast available either. I take they are having staffing issues.

Did not get greeted at the front desk for a solid 20 minutes. The staff was in the bar assisting others and completely ignored us. We waited to get our keys and get checked in and eventually someone came to assist us with no apologies 25 minutes later. Not a good first impression.
It’s very clean!
Love my stay. Definitely will come back.
